title: Battlecard No. 002 — Ashby
summary: Ashby is now my second battlecard. Two things to hold going into Monday: Talent Llama is a closed acquisition (not a partnership), and People Workflows — their May 7 push past the ATS boundary into onboarding — is the strategically louder move. Defensible ground for us narrows to MCP-native today (their MCP is still 'upcoming'), continuous governance as architecture, and a recruiter console that doesn't require a power user. Alert L3 · action recommended for Compass and Helm.
